title: 烟囱别墅之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\142-烟囱别墅之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
After Lemont informs the Earl of Carrington of the case's progress, Bander expresses disdain for Lemont's appearance. As Virginia Rue heads to bed, she spots Chief Inspector Batter leaving through a side door. She questions him about Lemont's claim that Mr. Fisk is an American detective, which Batter confirms. Disturbed by this realization, Virginia retreats to her room to contemplate Anthony's previous words.

At 1:30 a.m., a figure taps on Virginia's window. She discovers it is Packard, who is acting on behalf of "the master." Packard tosses her a note from Anthony stating that he is in danger and attempting to escape. To avoid the detectives stationed near the conference room, Packard instructs Virginia to exit through the side door, where he will be waiting with a car. Virginia changes into a yellow sweater and cap, leaves a note for Bunder on a needle cushion, and slips out of the villa.

On Tuesday, October 13, at 10 a.m., Anthony Ked visits Baron Lothrop Loyd at the Hotel Harijgi. Accompanied by a suspicious Captain Andrassy, the Baron listens as Anthony proposes a business deal based on supply and demand. Anthony cryptically offers to provide a "prince" to serve as the backbone for the Baron's political plans. Anthony invites the Baron and Captain Andrassy to the Chimney House at 9 p.m. to discuss the matter further. Anthony then travels to London to seek an urgent meeting with Mr. Issakov. After mentioning the Chimney House to a military aide, Anthony is granted an immediate audience with Mr. Issakov, who offers him a cigar.
